properties.description: this modern and beautifully maintained three-bedroom semi-detached home, perfectly suited for ...Listed on 3rd Dec 2025
properties.fullDescription: We are delighted to present this modern and beautifully maintained three-bedroom semi-detached home, perfectly suited for growing families or first-time buyers seeking a move in ready property on a highly sought-after new build development.Offered to the market with no onward chain, the home provides tandem off-street parking for two cars and is stylishly presented throughout.Upon entering, you are welcomed by a bright entrance hall leading to a ground floor W/C, a light-filled lounge, and a spacious contemporary kitchen/diner. This excellent family space benefits from French double doors opening directly onto the rear garden, creating a seamless indoor–outdoor flow ideal for entertaining or relaxing.Upstairs, the property comprises two generous bedrooms, a modern family bathroom, and a well-proportioned master bedroom complete with its own en-suite, giving the home a highly practical layout for modern living.The home is set within a popular, well-kept new-build development, and is ideally located for families, with well-regarded local schools close by. This includes primary and secondary options within easy reach-perfect for those looking for convenient access to education settings.Burnham-on-Crouch Station is also just a short drive away, offering direct London-bound routes, making this an excellent choice for commuters or first-time buyers needing reliable city connections.This superb, modern home offers comfortable, ready-to-go living in a desirable location and is truly a must-see.Viewings are highly recomendedLounge (4.74m x 3.29m)Kitchen/Diner (5.68m x 3.64m)Bedroom One (3.29m x 3.21m)En-Suite (2.33m x 1.36m)Bedroom Two (3.55m x 2.62m)Bedroom Three (2.64m x 2m)Bathroom (2.62m x 1.82m) The monthly repayments and interest rates provided are indicative and should be used as a guide only. properties.title: 3 bed property for sale
properties.description: a peaceful cul-de-sac on the highly sought-after and exclusive community of just 90 homes on the Emberton ...Listed on 19th Jun 2026
properties.fullDescription: Nestled within a peaceful cul-de-sac on the highly sought-after and exclusive community of just 90 homes on the Emberton Grange development, this stunning three-bedroom, three-bathroom semi-detached home offers contemporary living in an idyllic setting.Completed in 2023 and covered by a 10year construction warranty, the property combines a modern style with very high energy efficiency (EPC ‘B’).Enjoying attractive open countryside views to the front, this beautifully presented home provides the perfect balance between tranquil surroundings and excellent travel connectivity. Outside, the property benefits from a generous rear garden together with driveway parking for two vehicles and the added convenience of an electric vehicle charging point coupled with a front lawn to the side of the driveway providing room for possible extension.To the rear, the contemporary kitchen/dining room is fitted with a built-in double oven and gas hob, all just three years old. French doors open directly onto the patio and garden, creating a seamless indoor-outdoor space for dining and entertaining.Upstairs, the property offers three well-proportioned bedrooms. The principle bedroom features views over the fields and its own stylish en-suite shower room and the second bedroom benefits from a large, fitted wardrobe. A modern family bathroom serves the remaining bedrooms, creating a versatile layout ideal for families, visiting guests, or those working from home.Situated on the edge of the charming riverside town of Burnham-on-Crouch, the property is within easy walking distance of local shops, cafés, pubs, and restaurants. Burnham-on-Crouch railway station is just a 15 minute walk away, offering direct services to London Liverpool Street in around 60 minutes, making it an excellent choice for commuters. Regular bus routes also provide convenient links to both Maldon and Chelmsford and the bus stop is just a 10 minute walk away.Property Ownership InformationTenureFreeholdCouncil Tax BandCProperty Description DisclaimerThis is a general description of the property only, and is not intended to constitute part of an offer or contract. It has been verified by the seller(s), unless marked as "draft". Purplebricks conducts some valuations online and some of our customers prepare their own property descriptions, so if you decide to proceed with a viewing or an offer, please note this information may have been provided solely by the vendor, and we may not have been able to visit the property to confirm it. If you require clarification on any point then please contact us, especially if you’re traveling some distance to view. All information should be checked by your solicitor prior to exchange of contracts.Successful buyers will be required to complete anti-money laundering and proof of funds checks. properties.title: 2 bed detached for sale
properties.description: guide price £350,000 to £375,000*** We are delighted to present this beautifully appointed two-bedroom detached bungalow, ...Listed on 8th Jun 2026
properties.fullDescription: ***guide price £350,000 to £375,000***We are delighted to present this beautifully appointed two-bedroom detached bungalow, located in the lovely riverside town of Burnham-on-Crouch. Ideally positioned, this property is within walking distance of Burnham-on-Crouch Train Station, offering excellent transport links, as well as being close to a range of local amenities, reputable schools, and picturesque parks and public spaces.Upon entering, you are welcomed by a spacious and inviting Entrance Hall, which provides access to the main living areas of the home. The bungalow features two reception rooms, including a comfortable lounge with a log burner. The bright and airy orangery, with French doors leading out to the garden, connects seamlessly to the lounge, offering additional living space. A further door leads to the garage room.The kitchen is both functional and cosy, offering ample cupboard storage and a built-in fridge freezer. There is also space for freestanding appliances such as a gas cooker, oven, washing machine, and dryer, making this a practical and well-equipped space. Both bedrooms are generously proportioned, with the master bedroom benefiting from fitted wardrobes, ensuring plenty of storage space. The bathroom is well-appointed, comprising a walk-in shower cubicle, hand wash basin, and WC.Externally, the property is complemented by a fully established rear garden, which is laid to lawn and includes a large patio area, side access, decking, and a workshop area. A shed is also included for additional storage. The property offers a large driveway, providing ample off-road parking for multiple vehicles.This charming bungalow is an excellent opportunity for those seeking a peaceful yet conveniently located home. Palmers and Partners highly encourage early internal viewings to fully appreciate the potential this property has to offer.Entrance HallLounge4.80 x 3.33Orangery3.46 x 5.93Kitchen2.5 x 2.5BathroomBedroom 13.56 x 3.33Bedroom 22.47 x 2.50Garage Room4.8 x 2.1 The monthly repayments and interest rates provided are indicative and should be used as a guide only. properties.title: 2 bed end of terrace for sale
properties.description: a Road, Burnham-On-Crouch, Essex CM0For Sale this two Bedroom end of terrace home in a prime location in Burnham-On-Crouch. Offered to the market is this charming ...Listed on 27th May 2026
properties.fullDescription: For Sale this two Bedroom end of terrace home in a prime location in Burnham-On-Crouch.Offered to the market is this charming two bedroom end of terrace property, perfectly positioned just a stone’s throw from Burnham’s bustling high street – putting an excellent range of shops, cafés and amenities right on your doorstep. Equally convenient, the mainline train station, doctors’ surgery and pharmacy are all within easy reach, making this an ideal choice for commuters, families and professionals alike.Situated at the very beginning of the street, the property benefits from onstreet parking and handy side access – a practical feature for storage, deliveries or bringing items into the home.Inside, the layout is both flexible and wellproportioned. You are greeted by two inviting reception rooms: A bright, comfortable lounge ideal for relaxing, and a second room currently used as a dining space – perfect for meals and entertaining, and versatile enough to suit your own needs. Beyond this, you’ll find a spacious galley kitchen fitted with plenty of worktop and storage space, leading through to the wellappointed family bathroom.Upstairs, two generously sized bedrooms offer ample room for rest and storage, both lightfilled and designed to accommodate furniture easily.To the rear, the property features a lowmaintenance courtyardstyle garden – easily kept tidy, great for outdoor seating and enjoying fresh air without the upkeep of a larger plot.With its unbeatable location, practical features and attractive layout, this home represents a wonderful opportunity to move into a soughtafter area. Early viewing is highly recommended to appreciate everything it has to offer. The monthly repayments and interest rates provided are indicative and should be used as a guide only. properties.fullDescription: Situated in a prime location for the high street shops, restaurants, yacht clubs, country park, railway station and general amenities.Offered with no onward chain.This deceptively spacious three bedroom semi detached house offers on the ground floor. A large lounge with dining area, kitchen, double glazed conservatory and a cloakroom/w/cThe first floor offers three good size bedrooms and a family bathroom.Externally if you enjoy your garden and outside space, this 85 ft sunny aspect West facing garden will be the one for you.Parking in Burnham is at a premium and this property offers its own drive to the front.Storm PorchThe property has a keyhole storm entrance porch, to the entrance door.Entrance Hallway.Double glazed entrance door to the hallway, wood effect laminate flooring, radiator and stairs to the first floor landing.Kitchen (3.73m x 1.88m (12'3 x 6'2))Wood effect laminate flooring which runs into the open plan conservatory. The kitchen has a range of white eye level units with back tiling, matching base units and drawers with work surfaces over. Inset gas hob with above extractor and built in stainless steel oven below, inset one and a half white enamel sink, space for fridge/freezer and plumbing for a washing machine and radiator.Double Glazed Conservatory. (3.84m x 2.87m (12'7 x 9'5))As we have mentioned the conservatory is open plan to the kitchen and this modern style living works particularly well. Double glazed with sliding double glazed doors to the side and rear, reflective ceiling glass with fitted blinds. Built in cupboard and door to the cloakroom/w/c.Cloakroom/W/C.Tiled walls, close coupled w/c, hand wash basin and expel air.Lounge And Dining Area (8.36m x 3.43m (27'5 x 11'3))An excellent size room which could easily be separated into two rooms without to much work, if so desired. The lounge has a double glazed bay window to the front, wooden fireplace surround with a coal gas flame fire, television point and radiator.The dining area has plenty of space for a family table and chairs, radiator, double glazed double doors to the conservatory.LandingLoft access with ladder. Fully boarded with velux window. Combination boiler (not tested) and double glazed window to the side of landingBedroom One (3.78m x 3.43m (12'5 x 11'3))Triple built in sliding fronted doors to one wall, radiator and a double glazed window to the rear.Bedroom Two (3.84m x 2.77m (12'7 x 9'1 ))A good size double room with a double glazed window to the front and radiator.Bedroom Three (2.64m x 2.36m (8'8 x 7'9))Double glazed window to the front and radiator.BathroomTiled walls, oversize walk in shower cubicle, hand wash basin with double vanity cupboards below and a close coupled w/c. Above head electric heater, white heated towel rail and a double glazed window to the rear.West Facing In Excess Of 85 Ft Rear Garden. properties.title: 3 bed property for sale
properties.fullDescription: Positioned ideally for the high street shops, restaurants, river front, country park and railway station linked to London Liverpool Street.This three bedroom character cottage offers on the ground floor a lounge with original exposed floorboards and open fireplace. Separate dining room again with exposed floorboards, kitchen, side lobby and bathroom.The first floor has three bedrooms.Externally the property offers an excellent West facing rear garden in excess of 80 ft. If you enjoy the hot summer days and outside space then this undoubtedly will tick all the boxes.The garden is nicely established with planting and a attractive Walnut tree and a 14'8 x 9'7 garden shed and patio to the front.Entrance And Lounge (4.01m x 4.04m (13'2 x 13'3))Wooden entrance door with glazed dual decorative insets, exposed wooden floorboards. Brick open fireplace to make this a lovely cosy room to enjoy on those cold winter evenings, radiator, double glazed bow window to the front and stairs to the first floor.Dining Room (4.06m x 3.51m (13'4 x 11'6))Exposed original wooden floorboards, radiator, single double cupboard to one wall, double glazed double doors to the rear garden.Kitchen (3.25m x 1.96m (10'8 x 6'5))The kitchen has a range of cream eye level units with back tiling, matching base units and drawers with marble effect work surfaces over. Inset one and a half stainless steel sink, stainless steel inset gas hob with above extractor and stainless steel oven below. Plumbing for dish washer, space for fridge/freezer, tiled flooring and a double glazed window to the side.Side LobbyTiled flooring, double built in cupboards and a door to the side and garden.BathroomTiled flooring, hand wash basin with double vanity cupboards below, panelled bath with taps/shower attachment, close coupled w/c. Linen cupboard also with plumbing for a washing machine, double glazed window to the side and radiator.LandingLoft access.Bedroom One (4.04m x 2.95m (13'3 x 9'8))A good size double room with recesses for bedroom furniture, radiator and a double glazed window to the front.Bedroom Two (3.53m x 2.06m (11'7 x 6'9))Another double room with a double glazed window to the rear, radiator and a built in wardrobe space.Bedroom Three (2.64m x 1.96m (8'8 x 6'5))Wood effect laminate flooring, radiator and a double glazed window to the rear.Outside Attached Lean TooThis is a room to the rear of the house, currently utilised as an office space, with a window overlooking the garden and door to the side.West Facing Rear Garden (in excess of 24.38m ft (in excess of 80 ft))If you enjoy the summer sun and your outside space, then this excellent size garden is the one for you. Commencing with a concrete patio area, side gate to the front and some planting and a further circular patio seating area. Arch with climbing wisteria leading to the main garden which is neatly laid to lawn, established surrounding planting and a walnut tree. properties.fullDescription: Conveniently located for the high street, shops, restaurants, yacht clubs, river front, country park and the railway station linked to London Liverpool Street.A charming picturesque cottage offered in lovely order throughout, whilst retaining much of its character and features.This two bedroom property has the added bonus of a loft space/room with ladder stairs and could be used (stpc).The ground floor has a cosy lounge, inner hallway to a nicely presented fitted bathroom and a modern fitted kitchen/breakfast room.The first floor offers two double bedrooms and as mentioned a ladder/stairs to the loft room.Externally a good size rear garden with patio and set out with low maintenance in mind. To the front the cottage also benefits from a parking space for a small vehicle.Entrance PorchDouble glazed entrance door to the porch, wood effect laminate flooring.LoungeThe wood effect laminate flooring flows throughout the ground floor with exception to the bathroom, double glazed window to the front with fitted blind and television point. Understairs storage cupboard, radiator and stairs to the first floor.Inner HallwayBathroomThe bathroom has been fitted to a very good standard with a panelled bath and above fitted shower rain and hand held showers and screen, close coupled w/c and hand wash basin with vanity cupboards below. Majority tiled walls, tiled flooring, expel air and heated towel rail.Kitchen/Diner (4.60m x 2.97m (15'1 x 9'9))This is a generous size room with a range of modern white high gloss eye level units with back tiling, matching base units and drawers with wood effect work surfaces over. Double glazed window to the front and radaitor.Loft Space/Room (floor measurement 3.23m x 2.74m (floor measurement)This is a good size space with a velux window to the rear with part reduced head height to both sides. The boundaries are part brick wall and close board fenced and a there is a garden shed to the rear.Parking /FrontageThe property has a block Pavia frontage offering parking for one small vehicle. properties.title: 3 bed property for sale
properties.description: A ...Listed on 25th Jun 2026Auction
properties.fullDescription: Charming three-bedroom vacant mid-terrace home in A sought after central location For sale by online auction on Wednesday 29th of July 2026 at 9AM - ***charming three-bedroom vacant mid-terrace home in A sought after central location***ideal blend of comfort, convenience and character***just A short walk from local shops, schools, and the train station***potential market rental value of £1,450 pcm (£17,400 per annum), representing A potential annual yield of 8.9% based on guide price******Located in the heart of Burnham-on-Crouch, this is a delightful three-bedroom mid-terrace property on Queens Road.***The ground floor features a welcoming entrance hall leading to a bright and spacious living area, perfect for relaxation and entertaining. A well-proportioned kitchen/dining space provides plenty of room for family meals, with direct access to the rear gardenideal for outdoor dining and enjoying sunny days.Upstairs, the property offers three generously-sized bedrooms and a family bathroom, creating practical and comfortable living accommodation. In addition to the front yard, the private rear garden offers a peaceful retreat, while the property's central position ensures Burnham's picturesque waterfront, marina and nature walks are close at hand.With its inviting layout, superb location and great potential, this home is a fantastic find in one of Essex's most desirable riverside towns.***key features***- Three well-proportioned bedrooms- Mid-terrace property in a central, sought-after location- Spacious living area and separate kitchen/diner- Front yard and private rear garden- Walking distance to station, marina, shops & schools- With extension potential subject to requisite consents.- Freehold.***accomodation***Ground Floor - Reception Room, WC, Kitchen, Conservatory.First Floor - Three Bedrooms, Bathroom/WC.***potential market rental value of £1,450 pcm (£17,400 per annum), representing A potential annual yield of 8.9% based on guide price******recent nearby residential property sales***- 27, Queens Road, Burnham On Crouch, CM0 8DY - sold feb'25 - £330,000- 34, Queensborough Road, Southminster, CM0 7AB - 2 bedroom - sold aug'25 - £300,000- 3, Ithaca, Epsom Mews, Southminster, CM0 7GG - 2 bedroom - sold aug'25 - £270,000Burnham-on-Crouch is a town and civil parish in the Maldon District of Essex, in the East of England; it lies on the north bank of the River Crouch. It is one of Britain's leading places for yachting.The civil parish extends 5 miles (8 km) east of the town to the mouth of the River Crouch. It includes the hamlets of Creeksea and Ostend west of the town; Stoneyhills to the north; and Dammer Wick, West Wick and East Wick east of the town.***transport****Railway*- Burnham-on-Crouch stationBurnham-on-Crouch railway station is a stop on the Crouch Valley Line, which runs between Wickford and Southminster.Greater Anglia provides regular services to Wickford and Southminster, with direct services extending to and from London Liverpool S

properties.fullDescription: This beautifully presented Edwardian three bedroom semi-detached family home is situated on one of Burnham-on-Crouch's most sought-after roads, offering exceptional family living across two spacious floors while retaining a wealth of period charm.Stepping into the welcoming entrance hall, complete with recently fitted engineered wood flooring, you will immediately appreciate the quality of accommodation on offer.To the front of the property is an elegant living room featuring a charming fireplace. Double doors lead through to the delightful dining room, creating a versatile entertaining space, while a stable-style door provides convenient access to the side of the property.Beneath the staircase is a useful cloakroom, and beyond this lies the impressive open-plan kitchen / breakfast room. Beautifully fitted with a contemporary range of units, the kitchen benefits from integrated Bosch appliances, including an eye-level oven, separate microwave, fridge / freezer, dishwasher and washer / dryer.Undoubtedly the heart of the home, this stunning living space boasts high ceilings, a feature fireplace with wood-burning stove, and French doors opening directly onto the rear patio and garden, creating an ideal setting for both family life and entertaining.The first floor offers a generous full-width principal bedroom to the front of the property, complete with a walk-in box bay window and an attractive feature fireplace. The remaining two bedrooms are both comfortable doubles, each retaining their own feature fireplace, adding further character and charm. The bedrooms are served by a stylish family bathroom, fitted with a modern white suite and a power shower over the bath.Externally, the front garden is enclosed by an attractive traditional ironwork fence and beautifully planted with a variety of flowers and shrubs. properties.title: 4 bed property for sale
properties.description: Guide price £425,000-£450,000 Situated in the highly sought-after riverside town of Burnham-on-Crouch, this impressive ...Listed on 28th May 2026
properties.fullDescription: Guide price £425,000-£450,000 Situated in the highly sought-after riverside town of Burnham-on-Crouch, this impressive four-bedroom chalet bungalow on Alamein Road offers stylish and adaptable accommodation finished to an exceptional standard throughout. Ideally positioned within easy reach of the town centre, railway station, waterfront and an excellent range of local amenities, the property perfectly combines modern living with everyday convenience.The accommodation has been thoughtfully designed to provide flexible living space suitable for a variety of buyers, including families, downsizers and those working from home. Upon entering, the quality of finish is immediately apparent, with attractive engineered oak flooring extending throughout the majority of the ground floor accommodation. At the heart of the home is a spacious and light-filled lounge featuring contemporary tri-folding doors opening directly onto the rear garden, creating an ideal space for both entertaining and relaxing.The stylish fitted kitchen has been beautifully appointed with sleek slate grey cabinetry complemented by striking copper-effect handles and matching taps, while tiled flooring adds a practical yet modern touch. A separate utility room provides additional storage and laundry space, and the generous ground floor shower room has been finished with quality contemporary fittings.Although arranged as a four-bedroom home, the versatility of the layout allows the two ground floor bedrooms to be utilised as alternative reception rooms such as a formal dining room, home office, playroom or snug if desired. To the first floor are two well-proportioned double bedrooms along with a modern family bathroom serving the upstairs accommodation.Externally, the property continues to impress with a low-maintenance rear garden ideal for outdoor entertaining, together with an additional side garden area. To the front, a spacious driveway provides off-road parking for multiple vehicles, with a dropped kerb scheduled for completion prior to final handover.Alamein Road is conveniently located close to Burnham-on-Crouch High Street, where a wide selection of independent shops, cafés, restaurants, pubs and everyday conveniences can be found. The town’s picturesque river frontage and marina offer beautiful walks and sailing facilities, with Burnham being widely regarded as one of the UK’s premier sailing destinations. Burnham-on-Crouch railway station provides direct links into London Liverpool Street via Wickford, making the area popular with commuters seeking a balance between coastal living and city access. Excellent local schools, leisure facilities and scenic countryside walks are also nearby, further enhancing the appeal of this superb home.Entrance HallwayLounge - 4.85m x3.15m (15'11 x10'4)Kitchen - 4.27m x 3.58m (14 x 11'9)Utility Room -Ground Floor Shower RoomGround Floor Bedroom - 3.78m x 3.48m (12'5 x 11'5) -Ground Floor Bedroom -Bedroom - 5.1 x 3.1 (16'8" x 10'2")Bedroom - 5.1

properties.fullDescription: Situated on the Persimmon Homes Development which is located on the fringes of Burnham, but still offering easy into the town.The high street offers an array of shops, a supermarket, restaurants, yacht clubs and a railway link to London Liverpool Street Station along with general amenities.This deceptively spacious from first appearance, four bedroom semi detached house is set over three floors.The first floor offers a cloakroom/w/c, kitchen/dining room and a good size lounge.The second floor has three excellent size double bedrooms and a family bathroom and the third floor an impressive principal bedroom with en-suite.Externally the property has its own drive for multiple vehicles and a generous rear garden which has views across the school rugby/football fields.Entrance HallwayDouble glazed entrance door to the hallway which has wood effect laminate flooring, radiator with decorative cover, stairs to the first floor with under cupboard.Cloakroom/W/CClose coupled w/c, pedestal hand wash basin, radiator and a double glazed window to the front.Kitchen/Dining Room (4.70m x 2.97m (15'5 x 9'9))This is a nice size room with the kitchen having a range of white eye level units, matching base units and drawers with marble effect work surfaces over. Inset stainless gas hob with above stainless steel extractor and stainless steel oven below, plumbing for washing machine and dish washer and space for a fridge/freezer. Concealed wall mounted boiler ( not tested ) double glazed window to the front with fitted white/shutter blind. The dining area is a good space with plenty of space for a table and chairs and a radiator.Lounge (5.03m x 3.10m (16'6 x 10'2))This again is a good size room and has double glazed double doors and double glazed window to the rear. Wood effect laminate flooring, radiator and television point.Stairs To Second Floor Landing.Bedroom Two (4.06m x 2.90m (13'4 x 9'6))All the bedrooms are good size double rooms and this room has a feature panelled wall, radiator and a double glazed window to the rear.Bedroom Three. (3.68m x 2.92m (12'1 x 9'7))Double glazed window to the front, feature panelled wall and radiator.Bedroom Four. (3.12m x 1.98m (10'3 x 6'6))Double glazed window to the rear overlooking the playing fields and radiator.BathroomPart tiled walls, panelled bath, pedestal hand wash basin, close coupled w/c. Double glazed window to the front, expel air and radiatorStairs To The Third Floor Landing.Principal Bedroom (5.64m x 4.17m (18'6 x 13'8))An excellent size main bedroom with a double glazed window to the front and velux style ceiling window to the rear. Two radiators and door to the en-suite.En-suite Walk in shower cubicle, close coupled w/c, pedestal hand wash basin, expel air, radiator and a double glazed window to the front.Rear GardenThe property has a generous size rear garden commencing with a large/patio entertaining area, side gate to the drive and front. The main garden being laid to lawn with close board fenced boundaries.D

properties.fullDescription: *** £400,000 - £425,000 ***Offered with no onward chainA Home Designed for Family LifeTucked away within a quiet cul-de-sac in a popular residential setting of Burnham, this warm and welcoming home offers the perfect blend of comfort, space, and everyday practicality.From the moment you walk through the door, the property has an inviting feel that instantly feels like home. Natural light flows throughout the living spaces, creating a bright and relaxed atmosphere ideal for both quiet evenings in and lively family gatherings. The heart of the home is the beautifully arranged kitchen and dining space, perfect for morning coffees, busy weekday routines, and hosting friends and family long into the evening.Upstairs, the generous bedrooms provide peaceful retreats with plenty of room to grow, work, or unwind, while the family bathroom is finished in a clean and timeless style.Outside, the private rear garden offers a wonderful extension of the home itself, whether it’s summer barbecues, children playing freely, or simply enjoying a quiet moment at the end of the day. Positioned within a peaceful cul-de-sac setting, the property also benefits from a quieter, more private feel that families and buyers alike are often searching for. The home further benefits from under cover parking, providing both convenience and added practicality all year round.Adding even more versatility to the property is the cosy summer house tucked away at the end of the garden, creating the perfect space for a home office, creative studio, gym, or peaceful escape from the main home. A wonderful addition for modern family living and flexible lifestyles alike.Beautifully maintained and ready to move into, this is a home that offers more than just four walls. Inset one and a half stainless steel sink, inset stainless steel gas hob, above stainless steel extractor and a AEG double built in fan oven. Integrated fridge/freezer, washing machine and dish washer.The dining area has plenty of space for a table and chairs and has double glazed French doors with inset blinds to the South facing rear garden and a radaitor.LandingLoft access.Bedroom One En-SuiteBoth the bedrooms are excellent size double rooms and this has a double glazed window to the front, facing the green areas, dog walks and fields.
